query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'quotes' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 40 ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
